subject: [SDNC] SDNC ServiceMesh compatibility
commit_message:
[SDNC] SDNC ServiceMesh compatibility

Changes in the SDNC jobs to wait (and kill) the Sidecar
Update the SDC listener configuration
But still not working unless ElasticSearch works with Istio

Issue-ID: OOM-2820

Signed-off-by: Andreas Geissler <andreas-geissler@telekom.de>
Change-Id: Ib23f7bd95f6b2aed9955196b1e9c9080a6c37e05
